name: SoftJunk Lead Follow-Up Kit paid ZIP
zip_public_reason: The paid ZIP is delivered manually after the 5 USD PayPal transaction is visible or verified.

file_manifest.purpose: buyer start note and delivery rule
browser guide for the follow-up workflow
spreadsheet tracker for open leads and next actions
copy-paste follow-up templates for common lead situations
prompts for adapting sequences by business type, channel, concern, and tone

delivery_rule: Send the paid ZIP only after the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
